zh.lifeSummary: 當Laurence Richards於1446年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾時，他的父親Thomas Richards27歲，母親Alice Ricardes22歲。他於1480年與Elizabeth Wenman在英國奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1552年11月17日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾伊斯頓 內斯頓享年106歲。

nameMeanings.name: Richards
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Richard , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Rickards .
German: patronymic from the personal name   Richard  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

nameMeanings.name: Laurence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French form of Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’. Laurentum was a town in Latium, which may have got its name from Latin laurus ‘laurel’, although it is more probably of pre-Roman origin. The given name was moderately popular in the Middle Ages (when it was used for girls as well as boys), under the influence of a 3rd-century saint who was one of the seven deacons of Rome. He was martyred in 258 . The legend is that, having been required to hand over the Church's treasures to the civil authorities, he assembled the poor and sick and presented them. For this act of Christian defiance, he was roasted to death on a gridiron. In England the name is also associated with St Laurence of Canterbury ( d. 619 ). A more recent influence has been the actor Sir Laurence Olivier ( 1907–89 ). See also Lawrence .

en.lifeSummary: When Laurence Richards was born in 1446, in Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Richards, was 27 and his mother, Alice Ricardes, was 22. He married Elizabeth Wenman in 1480, in Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 17 November 1552, in Easton Neston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 106.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Wenman en 1480, à Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 novembre 1552, à Easton Neston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 106 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Laurence Richards(이)가 1446년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 민스터 러벨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Richards(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Ricardes(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1480년 영국 스퍼드실르 민스터 러벨에서 Elizabeth Wenman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1552년 11월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 이스트 네스턴에서 106세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Laurence Richards родился в 1446 г. в местности минстир лавелл, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Richards было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Ricardes, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wenman в 1480 г. в местности минстир лавелл, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 17 ноября 1552 г. в местности эастон нестон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 106 лет.
